MonoBehaviour id 915 on ddcontroller maps to script guid aa952cbcc0eb13d4ca558b6da550ff55 (GvrControllerVisual). Scene settings match script fields: touchPoint(fileID:109), material_idle(3b4f6031d569a624ba87b631c93a788a), material_app(3fe59d3fe0697b84196c28c184197906), material_system(6c9fcd230d4724c40af9e27326dc25f1), material_touchpad(a89bc9f2db5f60743a95275d0336b6c2), touchTransparent(089662c06964d614db131b6b344431e4), touchOpaque(7bc1b31ae424a1448b1be6be3707ad31). GvrControllerVisual exposes no public no-arg methods; its coverage relies on automatic lifecycle (Awake/Start/OnDestroy) and the external event GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate invoking private OnArmModelUpdate(). To achieve full coverage we need a public no-arg method on the parent Controller's GvrArmModel (fileID unknown, parent Transform fileID:527) to force an arm update, plus a way to simulate GvrController states: ClickButton, AppButton, Recentering, IsTouching, TouchPos and adjust GvrControllerVisual.AlphaValue.

MonoBehaviour id 921 on Laser maps to script guid 51b65678ccdd949e9a58874d2880c0ef (GvrLaserPointer). Scene settings match script fields: laserColor(r=1,g=1,b=1,a=0.2509804), maxLaserDistance=0.75, maxReticleDistance=2.5, reticle(fileID:176), reticleSortingOrder=32767. This script exposes a public no-arg method SetAsMainPointer() which must be manually triggered to register the pointer (not called automatically in Start). The other attached script MonoBehaviour id 922 maps to guid 4c173f7c6a736fe469d4acc5b108d6d5 (GvrArmModelOffsets) with joint=Pointer(0) and depends on GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate; additional info is needed to force that event.
